title: I'm Vegetarian — What's Safe?
description: Explain dietary restrictions to a server and find a dish that works.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi! Are you ready to order?

templates.text: Almost. Quick question — I'm vegetarian, no meat or fish. Which dishes work for me?
templates.hint_zh: 快好了。先問一下,我吃素,不吃肉跟魚。哪些可以點?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. The mushroom risotto, the eggplant parmigiana, and the garden pasta are all vegetarian.

templates.text: Does the risotto have any meat broth in it?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good catch — yes, it's made with chicken stock. The pasta is fully vegetarian, though.

templates.text: Then I'll go with the garden pasta. Is the parmesan vegetarian-friendly?
templates.hint_zh: 那我點蔬菜義大利麵。帕馬森起司是吃素可以的嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Some of our cheeses use animal rennet. I can ask the kitchen and let you know.

templates.text: Please do. If not, no cheese is fine.
templates.hint_zh: 麻煩你問一下,如果是的話那不加起司也可以。
